summary: Performance fix for Admin panel VERIFIED. All 15 backend tests passed. Admin Accounts page loads in <2s (was 7-23s). Admin Transfers Queue loads in <2s. Bulk balance calculation and bulk user lookups are working correctly. Frontend pages load quickly and display data correctly including sender info, IBANs, balances, and pagination.

issues: Some transfers show 'Unknown User' as sender - this may be test data or accounts that were deleted

critical_code_review_comments: Performance fix correctly implemented: get_bulk_balances() at line 79 in ledger_service.py uses single aggregation pipeline instead of N queries
get_admin_transfers() at line 359 in banking_workflows_service.py correctly uses bulk user and account lookups with O(1) map lookups
get_all_accounts_with_users endpoint correctly collects ledger_account_ids and calls get_bulk_balances in single query
Pagination implemented correctly with page/limit params - 'Page 1 of 2' for 72 accounts
Frontend AdminAccountsControl.js handles paginated response correctly
Frontend AdminTransfersQueue.js displays sender_name, sender_email, sender_iban correctly

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all pages load, pagination works, data displays correctly)

seed_data_creation: No test data created - READ ONLY verification (LIVE BANKING APPLICATION)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin panel performance fix is fully verified. Accounts endpoint uses bulk balance query (line 4195 in server.py). Transfers endpoint uses bulk user/account lookups (line 425-438 in banking_workflows_service.py). Both pages now load in <2 seconds vs previous 7-23 seconds. Customer dashboard also working correctly.

Backend: Accounts have correct balance data (bulk calculation working) - VERIFIED
